products.name: Dark Chocolate Kisses Cake
products.description: Three layers of intensely rich dark chocolate sponge coated in smooth, glossy ganache and finished with hand-piped chocolate rosettes, each crowned with a gold-foiled Hershey's Kiss. Decadent, dramatic, and made entirely for chocolate lovers.

products.name: Spiced Carrot Cake with Glacé Cherries
products.description: Warmly spiced carrot cake layers enveloped in silky cream cheese frosting, patterned with elegant concentric swirls across the top and crowned with glossy glacé cherries and sprigs of fresh rosemary. Tender, subtly sweet, and beautifully refined.

products.name: Red Velvet Naked Cake with Fresh Strawberries
products.description: Three striking layers of deep crimson velvet sponge left intentionally exposed, with generous cream cheese frosting piped between each tier and a crown of hand-piped rosettes and glistening fresh strawberries. Bold, romantic, and impossible to walk past.

products.name: Carrot & Walnut Cake with Cherries
products.description: A generously spiced carrot and walnut cake cloaked in caramel-hued cream cheese frosting textured with sweeping hand-crafted waves, finished with clusters of glazed cherries, crushed walnuts, and sprigs of fresh rosemary. Rich, nutty, and unmistakably artisan.

products.name: Red Velvet Strawberry Cheesecake
products.description: A silky, cloud-light cheesecake blanketed in a fine dusting of red velvet crumbs and crowned with a generous ring of plump, glossy fresh strawberries. The contrast of tangy cream cheese, tender crumb coating, and sweet ripe berries makes every slice extraordinary.

products.name: Blueberry & Floral Cheesecake
products.description: A rich baked cheesecake glazed with jewel-dark blueberry compote and piled high with plump fresh blueberries, adorned with vibrant cosmos blooms for a presentation as breathtaking as it is delicious. A true centrepiece worthy of any celebration.

products.name: Mixed Berry Cheesecake
products.description: A classic baked cheesecake bordered with hand-piped cream rosettes, finished with a glistening berry compote, an abundance of blueberries and fresh strawberries, and delicate thyme sprigs. Elegant, fresh, and satisfying to the last bite.

products.name: Lemon Curd & Thyme Cake
products.description: A light, airy cake wrapped in smooth whipped cream and crowned with a luminous pool of golden lemon curd, dressed with caramelised lemon slices and a delicate garland of fresh thyme. Bright, zesty, and elegantly understated.

products.name: Sourdough Loaf Gift Set
products.description: Two freshly baked sourdough loaves of your choice — classic, sesame, or cranberry and walnut — sliced and presented in signature Tanyabake branded kraft bags with our handcrafted seal. A thoughtful, delicious gift for any bread lover.

products.name: Red Velvet Strawberry Dream
products.description: A luscious red velvet cake swathed in smooth cream cheese frosting and coated with a fine dusting of red velvet crumbs, crowned with a beautiful ring of plump whole and halved fresh strawberries. Classic flavour, show-stopping presentation.

products.name: Orange Citrus Cream Cake
products.description: A vibrant citrus cream cake glazed with a silky orange curd, dressed with candied orange slices, cream rosettes, fresh strawberries and blueberries, and presented in a signature gift box with a satin bow. Bright, fresh, and utterly gift-worthy.

products.name: Chocolate Overload Celebration Cake
products.description: A deeply indulgent chocolate ganache cake piled generously with Oreo cookies, Ferrero Rocher truffles, KitKat pieces, fresh blueberries and gold candy pearls. For those who believe there is no such thing as too much chocolate.

products.name: Safari Animal Birthday Cake
products.description: A fun, festive chocolate drip cake adorned with Ferrero Rocher chocolate swirls and cheerful safari animal toppers — lions, giraffes, elephants and more. The perfect centrepiece for a little one's jungle-themed party.

products.name: Carrot Cake (1.5 kg)
products.description: A classic 1.5 kg spiced carrot cake generously swathed in smooth cream cheese frosting, piped with elegant rosettes and finished with crushed nuts, cranberries and a sprig of fresh rosemary. The ideal size for an intimate gathering.

products.name: Carrot Cake Gift Box
products.description: Our signature spiced carrot cake elegantly presented in a 'Just For You' gift box, adorned with gold pearl bead clusters, delicate micro herbs and a touch of edible gold leaf. A truly thoughtful and delicious gift.

products.name: Lemon Curd Celebration Cake
products.description: A light, airy sponge encased in smooth whipped cream, topped with a generous pool of luminous golden lemon curd and decorated with caramelised lemon slices and fresh thyme. A zesty, refined treat for citrus lovers.

products.name: Chocolate Ganache & Berry Cake
products.description: A rich, deeply indulgent chocolate cake smoothed with velvety ganache and pre-scored for easy serving, crowned with halved strawberries, plump blueberries and delicate thyme sprigs. Impressive, effortless and utterly delicious.

products.name: Carrot Cake (2.5 kg)
products.description: A generous 2.5 kg celebration carrot cake fully frosted in cream cheese, decorated with hand-piped rosettes, whole pecan halves, dried cranberries, crushed walnuts and a sprig of rosemary. Perfect for large parties and special milestones.

products.name: Biscoff Drip Cake
products.description: A stunning biscoff-spiced layer cake coated in warm caramel buttercream with a glossy caramel drip finish, crowned with a ring of whole Lotus Biscoff cookies. Rich, warming, and utterly irresistible for biscoff lovers.

products.name: Carrot Cake with Birthday Decor
products.description: A beautifully spiced carrot cake swathed in silky cream cheese frosting, decorated with elegant hand-piped parallel lines, scattered blueberries, walnuts and dried cranberries, and finished with a personalised birthday topper.

products.name: Red Velvet Celebration Cake
products.description: A striking red velvet cake with a cream cheese shell-piped border, scattered red velvet crumbs, fresh strawberries, blueberries and golden physalis. Eye-catching, celebratory, and deeply satisfying.

products.name: Chocolate Birthday Cake with Berries
products.description: A velvety chocolate birthday cake with deeply textured ganache frosting, crowned with a lavish arrangement of fresh strawberries, plump blueberries, mint leaves and edible gold leaf flakes. Decadent and beautifully festive.

products.name: Classic Birthday Carrot Cake
products.description: A rustic two-layer carrot cake topped with billowing cream cheese frosting sweeping across the surface, scattered with fresh blueberries, dried cranberries and toasted walnuts, finished with a golden birthday topper.

products.name: Classic Red Velvet Naked Cake
products.description: A beautifully simple exposed-layer red velvet sponge with cream cheese frosting piped around the top edge, decorated with fresh strawberries, blueberries and a vibrant yellow daisy. Rustic, colourful and full of charm.

products.name: Pink Floral Birthday Cake
products.description: A breathtaking cake entirely covered in hand-piped buttercream blooms in rich shades of deep coral, rose pink and red, scattered with pearl bead accents and crowned with a Happy Birthday topper. A floral masterpiece that doubles as a centrepiece.

products.name: Biscoff Cheesecake
products.description: A deeply indulgent Biscoff cheesecake with a silky caramel-hued glaze, generously topped with crushed Lotus biscuit crumble and whole Biscoff cookies standing upright. Warming, caramel-spiced, and utterly irresistible.

products.name: Classic Strawberry Cream Cake
products.description: An elegant cream cake with cloud-soft whipped frosting and a spectacular crown of whole glistening fresh strawberries kissed with edible gold flakes. Light, beautiful and deeply satisfying.

products.name: Chocolate Birthday Cheesecake with Berries
products.description: A rich, dark chocolate cheesecake on a chocolate crumb crust, piled high with plump fresh strawberries and blueberries and dusted with icing sugar snow. A show-stopping centrepiece for any birthday celebration.

products.name: Strawberry Glazed Cheesecake
products.description: A silky baked cheesecake blanketed entirely in a jewel-bright strawberry glaze and piled generously with fresh chunked strawberries. Glistening, sweet and irresistibly inviting.

products.name: Grand Strawberry Celebration Cake
products.description: An impressive large celebration cake with snowy whipped cream frosting, an elegant scalloped cream border, and a spectacular mound of plump whole fresh strawberries with edible gold flake accents. Grand, celebratory, and utterly stunning.

products.name: Classic Blueberry Cheesecake
products.description: A silky baked cheesecake with an elegant scalloped cream border, rich blueberry compote and a generous mound of plump fresh blueberries, finished with gold leaf flakes and sprigs of fresh rosemary. A timeless, beautiful classic.

products.name: Mini Blueberry Cream Cakes
products.description: Petite individual cakes presented in decorative tins, topped with silky vanilla cream rosettes, a plump fresh blueberry, gold pearl beads and a delicate sprig of thyme. A refined little indulgence for any occasion.

products.name: Mini Red Velvet Cakes
products.description: Individual portion red velvet cakes presented in elegant tins, finished with a fine red velvet crumb dusting and a glistening whole fresh strawberry on top. Beautiful, festive and perfectly portioned.

products.name: Mini Carrot Cake
products.description: An individual carrot cake portion served in a decorative tin, topped with cream cheese frosting rosettes, a glazed cherry, crushed nuts and a sprig of rosemary. All the warmth of a full cake in a single elegant serving.

products.name: Mini Chocolate Hazelnut Cake
products.description: An individual chocolate cake with a glossy ganache drip, a Ferrero Rocher hazelnut truffle, fresh strawberries and blueberries, finished with a sprig of rosemary. Rich, indulgent and beautifully presented.

products.name: Mini Artisan Cake Boxes
products.description: Individual mini spiced cakes presented in elegant single-serve gift boxes, topped with cream cheese frosting rosettes, fresh blueberries, crushed nuts, dried fruit and a cheerful fresh daisy. A beautiful party favour or thoughtful gift.

products.name: Carrot Cake Cupcakes — Box of 10
products.description: A beautiful board of 10 generously spiced carrot cake cupcakes, each topped with a swirl of smooth cream cheese frosting, scattered with crushed walnuts, a whole pecan, fresh blueberries and a sprig of rosemary.

products.name: Coconut Cream Cake with Berries
products.description: A light, delicately flavoured coconut cream cake with hand-piped cream borders, adorned with fresh strawberries, blueberries and rosemary, and presented with a personalised birthday ribbon bow. Elegant and effortlessly beautiful.

products.name: Coconut Buttercream Sheet Cake
products.description: A stunning rectangular sheet cake with lush coconut buttercream, hand-piped sage green and cream floral borders, shimmering edible butterfly wafers and gold accents. Personalised with your message in gold letter decorations. Perfect for farewells, celebrations and large gatherings.

products.name: Coconut Cream Cake with Yellow Daisies
products.description: A cloud-soft coconut cream cake topped with vibrant yellow chrysanthemum blooms, golden pearl beads and delicate herb sprigs arranged in a charming wreath. Light, fragrant and effortlessly beautiful for any celebration.

products.name: Rainbow Butterfly Buttercream Cake
products.description: A spectacular coconut cake entirely covered in multicolour buttercream rosettes and star-tip blooms — pink, lavender, blue, cream and coral — adorned with shimmering edible butterfly wafers and candy pearls. A joyful, exuberant showstopper.

products.name: Cranberry Walnut Sourdough
products.description: A naturally leavened sourdough laced with tart dried cranberries and generous pockets of toasted walnut, baked to a deep golden crust around an airy, open crumb. Sweet, nutty and wonderfully balanced — equally at home with cheese or simply on its own.

products.name: Jalapeño Cheddar Sourdough
products.description: A bold, savoury sourdough swirled with sharp cheddar and bright slices of jalapeño folded throughout the open crumb, baked to a crisp golden crust. Spicy, cheesy and full of character — a standout for sandwiches or toasted on its own.

products.name: Mixed Sesame Sourdough
products.description: A naturally fermented sourdough generously studded with black and white sesame seeds throughout the dough, baked to a deeply golden, crackling crust. Nutty, aromatic and beautifully textured — a wonderful everyday loaf with real depth of flavour.

products.name: Flaxseed Sourdough
products.description: A wholesome sourdough loaf studded throughout with flaxseed and a mix of seeds, slow-fermented for a tender, open crumb beneath a deeply golden crust. Earthy and satisfying, with a delicate nuttiness that pairs beautifully with butter or honey.

products.name: Classic Plain Sourdough
products.description: A timeless, naturally leavened sourdough with a crisp golden crust and a light, airy crumb shaped by a long, slow ferment. Simple, versatile and beautifully made — the everyday loaf done right.

products.name: Thai Tea Macadamia Sourdough
products.description: A striking amber-hued sourdough infused with fragrant Thai tea and studded with buttery whole macadamia nuts, baked to a richly coloured, tender crumb. Aromatic, distinctive and quietly luxurious — a truly one-of-a-kind loaf.
